title: OREGON NATIONAL GUARD STATE TUITION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON NATIONAL GUARD STATE TUITION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides funding for Oregon National Guard Members enrolled in an post secondary institutions. 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Current National Guard member -Not have achieved a bachelor's degree or higher -Be enrolled and in good standing -Complete military basic training -Not be in default on any federal Title IV loan or owe a refund on federal Title IV funds previously received unless the institution giving funds determines that the student has made satisfactory arrangements to repay and has regained federal eligibility Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-7400 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Student Financial Aid * Active Military Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - DECEASED OR DISABLED PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICER GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OFFICE OF STUDENT ACCESS AND COMPLETION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON BARBER AND HAIRDRESSER GRANT PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROMISE GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TEACHER SCHOLARS PROGRAM GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TRIBAL STUDENT GRANT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION
